Through its inscriptions, which are duplicated in more than one script, scholars were able to unlock the meaning of hieroglyphs, which had been a mystery for centuries. ANCIENT EGYPTIAN HIEROGLYPHS. ROSETTA STONE The Rosetta Stone was discovered during Napoleon's campaign in Egypt NAPOLEON. ROSETTA STONE The discovery of the Rosetta Stone is a significant event in the field of archaeology ARCHAEOLOGY. ROSETTA STONE The decipherment of the Rosetta Stone had a profound impact on the field of linguistics, particularly in understanding ancient languages LINGUISTICS. CHAMPOLLION Champollion's work on the Rosetta Stone is foundational to the field of Egyptology, contributing to the understanding of ancient Egyptian language and culture EGYPTOLOGY. ROSETTA STONE The deciphering of the Rosetta Stone significantly advanced the field of Egyptology by providing insights into ancient Egyptian culture and language EGYPTOLOGY. JEAN-FRANÇOIS CHAMPOLLION Jean-François Champollion's work led to the deciphering of ancient Egyptian hieroglyphs ANCIENT EGYPTIAN HIEROGLYPHS. ROSETTA STONE Jean-François Champollion deciphered the hieroglyphic text on the Rosetta Stone JEAN-FRANÇOIS CHAMPOLLION.
